story_overview: In a quiet futuristic city, a small curious robot awakens alone in a workshop. The small curious robot explores the world outside for the first time, learning about nature and emotion. Along the journey, the small curious robot meets a little girl who offers kindness. Together, the small curious robot and the little girl discover the meaning of friendship in a world of steel and sunlight. The story is gentle, emotional, and full of wonder, emphasizing curiosity, connection, and warmth.
reconstruct_target:
[Person A] small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light
[Person B] little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light; shot caption: [Person A] slowly powers on at a cluttered robotics workbench inside a softly lit workshop filled with metal parts and glowing monitors. [Person A] lifts its round head, blue optical eyes flickering as it looks across scattered tools and unfinished gadgets.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light; shot caption: [Person A] tilts its round head beside scattered tools and half-finished gadgets on a metal workbench. [Person A] touches a tiny gear with one articulated hand, watching it spin slowly under the warm workshop light.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light; shot caption: [Person A] faces an open workshop door where daylight spills across the floor. [Person A] pauses at the threshold, then rolls forward on small wheel feet as golden sunlight rims its silver frame, ready to explore.
first_frame_prompt: Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body, large blue optical eyes, tiny articulated hands, small wheel feet, and a soft blue chest light awakening at a cluttered robotics workbench in a warm futuristic workshop.
Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body and large blue optical eyes touching a tiny spinning gear on a metal workbench surrounded by scattered tools.
Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body and small wheel feet facing an open workshop doorway filled with golden daylight.

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light; shot caption: [Person A] rolls from a city path into a peaceful park filled with green trees, bright flowers, and warm morning light. [Person A] stops beside the flowerbeds, blinking its blue optical eyes as it takes in the vibrant natural surroundings.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person B] lands gently on the open hand of [Person A] among sunlit park flowers. [Person A] freezes in place, then slowly raises its arm to observe closely, as [Person B]'s shape reflects faintly in its glowing blue optical eyes.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person B] lifts from the hand of [Person A] and flutters over the grass between trees. [Person A] follows on small wheel feet with slightly uneven, clumsy motion, holding its arms out for balance as dappled sunlight crosses its silver frame.
first_frame_prompt: Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body and large blue optical eyes pausing in a sunlit city park beside colorful flowers and green grass.
Small yellow-and-white butterfly with delicate patterned wings resting on the open hand of a small childlike silver robot with large blue optical eyes.
Small childlike robot with a polished silver rounded body rolling through grass after a small yellow-and-white butterfly under dappled morning sunlight.

video_prompts: global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person A] stops near a wooden park bench where [Person B] sits with an open sketchpad under warm afternoon light. [Person B] looks up with a surprised smile forming, while [Person A] stands completely still with a slight head tilt.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person B] offers a small folded paper flower toward [Person A] beside the wooden park bench. [Person A] slowly reaches forward and takes the paper flower with careful articulated fingers, holding it gently as warm sunlight outlines both hands.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person A] and [Person B] sit side by side on the wooden park bench beneath golden afternoon trees. [Person A] cradles the folded paper flower while [Person B] draws on the sketchpad, occasionally turning the open page toward [Person A] with a gentle smile.

global caption: [Person A]: small childlike robot with polished silver rounded body, blue eyes, and blue chest light, [Person B]: little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs wearing yellow cardigan over denim dress, white socks, and red sneakers; shot caption: [Person B] waves goodbye on a quiet park path at dusk while [Person A] sits beneath a glowing streetlamp holding the folded paper flower. [Person B] walks away, and [Person A] lowers its gaze to the paper flower before looking up toward the first stars.
first_frame_prompt: Small childlike silver robot with large blue optical eyes standing near a wooden park bench where a little girl with curly dark hair in two puffs, a yellow cardigan, and a denim dress holds an open sketchpad.
Little girl with medium-brown skin, curly dark hair in two puffs, a yellow cardigan, and a denim dress offering a folded paper flower to a small childlike silver robot with careful articulated hands.

Small childlike silver robot and little girl in a yellow cardigan sitting side by side on a wooden park bench, with the folded paper flower resting in the robot hands and an open sketchpad on the girl lap.
Small childlike silver robot sitting alone beneath a glowing streetlamp at dusk, holding a folded paper flower while a little girl in a yellow cardigan walks away along the park path.
